news.t: Look to State Street, Invesco, VanEck for Top-Performing ETFs in 2026
Pipeline love as gas shortage rages, Colonial remains offline

overview.description: The United States Gasoline Fund LP (UGA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Front Month Unleaded Gasoline index. The fund holds near-month NYMEX futures contracts on reformulated gasoline blendstock for oxygen blending (RBOB) gasoline. UGA was launched on Feb 26, 2008 and is issued by Marygold.
